title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses six security dangers posed by autonomous AI agents, covering vulnerabilities such as prompt injection and credential exposure. The video examines how agent autonomy, tool access, and memory mechanisms create real-world security risks and offers guidance on safe deployment practices.
